title: genista tricuspidata subsp. caballeroi
intro: Genista tricuspidata subsp. caballeroi, also known as Spanish broom, is a shrub-like plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Genista tricuspidata subsp. caballeroi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be consumed as a dietary supplement after being processed into capsules or tablets.
